team.name: Dr. Sarah Chen, DDS
team.bio: UT Health San Antonio graduate with 14 years of experience. Specializes in restorative and cosmetic dentistry. Known for her calm demeanor and thorough explanations.

team.name: Dr. Marcus Rivera, DMD
team.bio: Baylor College of Dentistry graduate. Focuses on pediatric and family dentistry. Fluent in English and Spanish.

team.name: Jamie Okafor, RDH
team.bio: 12 years of experience. Certified in laser therapy and periodontal care. Patients love her gentle touch.

services.name: Routine Cleanings & Exams
services.description: Comprehensive dental exams, professional cleanings, and digital X-rays. Recommended every 6 months.

services.name: Emergency Dental Care
services.description: Same-day appointments available for dental emergencies including severe pain, broken teeth, and infections. Call us immediately.

services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: In-office Zoom whitening (1 hour, dramatic results) and custom take-home whitening trays.

services.name: Dental Implants
services.description: Full implant placement and restoration. Free consultation available. We use Nobel Biocare implant systems.

services.name: Invisalign Clear Aligners
services.description: Certified Invisalign provider. Free smile assessment. Treatment plans typically 6–18 months.

services.name: Crowns & Bridges
services.description: Same-day CEREC crowns available. Porcelain, zirconia, and PFM options.

services.name: Root Canal Therapy
services.description: Gentle root canal treatment with modern rotary instruments. Most patients report little to no discomfort.

services.name: Pediatric Dentistry
services.description: Kid-friendly dental care for ages 2+. Sealants, fluoride treatments, and cavity prevention. Dr. Rivera specializes in making kids comfortable.

services.name: Periodontal (Gum) Treatment
services.description: Deep cleanings (scaling and root planing), gum disease management, and maintenance programs.

services.name: Cosmetic Bonding & Veneers
services.description: Fix chips, gaps, and discoloration. Composite bonding for minor fixes, porcelain veneers for complete smile makeovers.

insurance.notes: We accept most major PPO plans. We are out-of-network for HMO/DHMO plans. We'll file claims on your behalf and help you understand your coverage. No insurance? Ask about our Maplewood Smile Plan — $299/year covers two cleanings, exams, X-rays, and 15% off all other services.

paymentOptions: In-house payment plans for treatments over $1,000

newPatientInfo.firstVisit: Your first visit includes a comprehensive exam, full-mouth digital X-rays, and a personalized treatment plan discussion. Allow 60–75 minutes.
newPatientInfo.paperwork: Complete your new patient forms online before your visit to save time. We'll send you a link when you book.
newPatientInfo.cancellationPolicy: We ask for 24 hours' notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations may be subject to a $50 fee.

faqs.question: Are you accepting new patients?
faqs.answer: Yes! We are always welcoming new patients of all ages. Call us or book online to schedule your first visit.

faqs.question: Do you offer payment plans?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer CareCredit financing with 0% interest options, plus in-house payment plans for treatments over $1,000. We never want cost to be a barrier to good dental care.

faqs.question: What if I have a dental emergency?
faqs.answer: Call us immediately at (512) 555-0187. We reserve same-day slots for emergencies during business hours. If it's after hours, our voicemail will provide instructions for urgent situations.

faqs.question: How do I know if my insurance is accepted?
faqs.answer: We accept most major PPO plans including Delta Dental, Cigna, Aetna, MetLife, and more. Call us with your insurance info and we'll verify your coverage before your visit — no surprises.

faqs.question: Is teeth whitening safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, professional teeth whitening is safe when supervised by a dentist. We use the Zoom whitening system which is FDA-approved. We'll evaluate your teeth first to make sure you're a good candidate.

faqs.question: Do you see children?
faqs.answer: Yes! Dr. Rivera specializes in pediatric dentistry and sees patients as young as 2 years old. We make dental visits fun and stress-free for kids.

faqs.question: What COVID safety measures do you have?
faqs.answer: We follow all CDC and ADA guidelines. Enhanced sanitization between patients, HEPA air filtration in every operatory, and temperature screening at check-in.

faqs.question: How long does an Invisalign treatment take?
faqs.answer: Most Invisalign treatments at our practice take between 6 and 18 months, depending on complexity. We offer a free smile assessment to give you a personalized timeline and cost estimate.

faqs.question: Do you offer sedation dentistry?
faqs.answer: We offer nitrous oxide (laughing gas) for anxious patients and oral sedation for longer procedures. Let us know about any dental anxiety when you book — we'll make sure you're comfortable.

faqs.question: What's your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: We ask for 24 hours' notice if you need to cancel or reschedule. Late cancellations may incur a $50 fee. We understand emergencies happen — just communicate with us and we'll work with you.

uniqueSellingPoints: Locally owned, not a corporate chain — Dr. Chen lives in Windsor Park
Open select Saturdays for working families
Same-day CEREC crowns — no temporary crowns, no second visit
Kid-friendly environment with a play area in the waiting room
Free second opinions on treatment plans from other practices

highlights: "Dr. Chen took the time to explain everything and never pressured me into unnecessary treatments." — Maria G.
"My 4-year-old actually looks forward to going to the dentist now. Dr. Rivera is amazing with kids." — Jason T.
"Had a tooth emergency on a Thursday evening and they got me in first thing Friday morning. Lifesavers." — Priya K.
